item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 030600Z AUTO 23008KT 200V260 9999 BKN012 BKN020 OVC026 15/13 Q1015 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 030500Z 0306/0406 23010KT 9999 SCT020 PROB30 TEMPO 0306/0308 -DZ BKN012 BECMG 0309/0311 21015G25KT BECMG 0311/0313 BKN012 PROB40 TEMPO 0316/0319 4000 -RA BKN009 BECMG 0319/0321 FEW016 PROB30 TEMPO 0321/0324 23015G30KT PROB40 TEMPO 0404/0406 -SHRA SCT016TCU
